---
title: "Architecture question: "
labels: [architecture]
---

## Question

What architecture decision or tradeoff would you like to discuss?

## Context

Describe your expected workload, deployment model, reliability requirements, and integration constraints.

## Options Considered

List the approaches you have considered and any tradeoffs you have identified.

## Specific Feedback Requested

What kind of feedback would be most useful from maintainers or the community?
